title: Lifecycle-aware SDD example ruleset
description:
Rework the SDD example ruleset so coverage and derivation rules are lifecycle-aware: silent or advisory while work is in flight, blocking at completion.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] Coverage and req-satisfaction rules in the SDD example use state predicates so an in-flight epic with incomplete children yields no error-severity findings
- [ ] An epic with an uncovered `[hard]` criterion cannot transition to `done` (blocked via transition enforcement)
- [ ] The stray-req check from the disambiguation work is wired into the example
- [ ] Example comments and the validation-engine concepts doc describe the new lifecycle behavior accurately
- [ ] The June 2026 evaluation scenarios (in-flight epic, premature done, stray req) all behave correctly against the reworked example
